name: mostParamGetString
title: mostParamGetString
syntax: long mostParamGetString (mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], char buffer[], long buffersize); // form 1
long mostParamGetString (mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], long arrayIndex, char buffer[], long buffersize); // form 2
description: Query of parameters of the String type from an AMS message using the parameter name from the XML function catalog.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message from which the parameter should be read.

parameters.name: paramAdr
parameters.description: Identification of parameters (see Symbolic Identification of Parameters).

parameters.name: arrayIndex
parameters.description: Parameter index in arrays or sequences. This declaration overwrites the indexing in the brackets of <paramAdr>.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer to which the parameter bytes are copied.

parameters.name: buffersize
parameters.description: Maximum number of copied parameter bytes (can be specified with (elcount(buffer))).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
